title: Resolved issues in the master registry do not record resolved transitions in issue_history
description: The master .workflow/issues/issues.jsonl has multiple records whose top-level status is resolved and resolved_at/resolution are populated, but their inline issue_history still contains only the original registered transition. This breaks registry auditability and any status-history/schema consistency checks that reconstruct lifecycle from issue_history. Confirmed on 16 records, e.g. ISS-20260531-002; discovery snapshot copies remaining registered are expected, but the master registry is internally inconsistent.
fix_direction: When resolving or bulk-auditing issues, append an issue_history transition from registered (or prior status) to resolved with actor/at/note, or run a one-time backfill for resolved records using resolved_at/resolution. Add a registry integrity check that status must appear in issue_history for lifecycle states.

context.notes: Discovered by Round 4 tail sweep DBP-20260609-032300

issue_history.note: Registered by Round 4 dedup + issue creation worker

title: Windows drive-letter absolute paths bypass plan_context path sandbox
description: planContext 的 sandbox guard 先把反斜杠替换成斜杠，但只用 normalized.startsWith("/") 判定绝对路径。Windows 绝对路径如 C:\repo\src\x.ts 会变成 C:/repo/src/x.ts，不触发 absolute-path 拒绝，随后进入 dedupePaths、knowledge_context_planned.target_paths 和 selection token 状态；fab_recall 复用 planContext，也继承该问题。
fix_direction: 使用 node:path 的 Windows/平台无关绝对路径判断，或显式拒绝 /^[A-Za-z]:[\/]/ 与 UNC 前缀；为 input.paths 和 target_paths 增加 C:\、C:/、\\server\share 回归测试。

context.notes: Discovered by Round 4 tail sweep DBP-20260609-032300

issue_history.note: Registered by Round 4 dedup + issue creation worker

title: Store executable guard follows store-controlled symlinks outside the store
description: findStoreExecutableViolations walks store contents with statSync(abs), which follows symlinks. A mounted store can include a symlink/junction to a directory outside the store; the guard will recurse into that external tree under an in-store relPath, causing privacy/DoS-prone scanning and false executable violations instead of treating the symlink itself as an untrusted store entry. Existing tests cover script extension, exec bit, .git, depth and entry bounds, but not symlink escape.
fix_direction: Switch to lstatSync for traversal, reject/report symlinks as store violations or resolve realpath and verify it remains under the store root before stat/recurse; add tests for symlink-to-file and symlink-to-directory escaping the store.

context.notes: Discovered by Round 4 tail sweep DBP-20260609-032300

issue_history.note: Registered by Round 4 dedup + issue creation worker

title: Write target can resolve outside the project's read-set
description: The resolver contract says a write target is chosen from the read-set, but resolveWriteTarget searches all mountedStores for active/default/route aliases. storeSwitchWrite only validates the alias is mounted and writable, then sets active_write_store/default_write_store without ensuring it is required/bound. A project can therefore write team knowledge into a mounted store that resolveReadSet/cross-store recall does not read, making new entries invisible to the same project until a separate bind happens.
fix_direction: Resolve non-personal write targets from the resolved read-set, or make switch-write/route-write require or automatically add the target to required_stores before saving. Add a regression where active_write_store points to a mounted-but-unbound store and assert writeTarget is null or the store enters readSet.

context.notes: Discovered by Round 4 tail sweep DBP-20260609-032300

issue_history.note: Registered by Round 4 dedup + issue creation worker

title: $personal required-store sentinel is accepted but treated as a missing shared store
description: Store/fabric config docs describe suggested_remote '$personal' as a way for a required_store to be satisfied by the implicit personal store, and the schema test accepts that shape. buildStoreResolveInput preserves suggested_remote, but resolveReadSet matches only non-personal mounted stores by req.id and only uses suggested_remote text in the missing_store warning. A valid config like {id:'p', suggested_remote:'$personal'} therefore warns as missing instead of resolving to the mounted personal store.
fix_direction: Either implement the sentinel by mapping suggested_remote=='$personal' to the implicit personal entry with no missing_store warning, or remove the sentinel contract from schema/docs/tests. Add a golden read-set case for the sentinel path.

context.notes: Discovered by Round 4 tail sweep DBP-20260609-032300

issue_history.note: Registered by Round 4 dedup + issue creation worker

title: Alias and UUID declarations for the same store duplicate read-set entries
description: required_stores entries are free-form ids and bindRequiredStore dedupes only by exact id. resolveReadSet then loops each entry, matches alias or store_uuid, and pushes a read-set entry every time with no store_uuid dedupe. If a config contains both a store alias and its UUID, the same store is listed/scanned twice; cross-store recall maps readSet.stores directly to directories, so candidates and labels can duplicate and scan work increases.
fix_direction: Normalize required store ids to the matched store_uuid during bind/resolve and skip duplicate store_uuid entries in resolveReadSet while preserving one warning per unresolved id. Add alias+UUID golden coverage asserting one read-set entry.

context.notes: Discovered by Round 4 tail sweep DBP-20260609-032300

issue_history.note: Registered by Round 4 dedup + issue creation worker

title: fabric install --dry-run 的 project pipeline 仍执行真实写入
description: install-v2 将 --dry-run 解析为 context.options.planOnly，但 pipeline 中只有 guidance stage 读取该状态。EnvStage 仍无条件 mkdir .fabric、写 fabric-config/.gitignore/events.jsonl/forensic.json；StoreStage 仍可 runGlobalInstall、mount/bind --url；HooksStage 仍安装 skills/hooks/bootstrap 和 client configs。用户执行 fabric install --dry-run 会触发真实 project/global/client 写入，区别于已登记的 --global dry-run 问题。
fix_direction: 在 InstallPipeline 顶层实现 planOnly 分支，或让每个 Stage 在 context.options.planOnly 下只构建/渲染计划并返回 skipped/dry-run 结果；为 install-v2 CLI 加 snapshotTree no-write 回归，覆盖 fresh workspace、missing file、--url、hooks/client config。

context.notes: Discovered by Round 4 tail sweep DBP-20260609-032300

issue_history.note: Registered by Round 4 dedup + issue creation worker

title: Mutating CLI commands silently ignore misspelled safety flags
description: unknown flag guard 明确只挂在 read-only info/status/whoami；citty 会把未知长 flag 放进 args 而不拒绝。sync/store/install/doctor/uninstall 等写命令没有调用 warnUnknownFlags，例如 fabric sync --continuu 会落到 runStartSync，fabric store migrate --dry-rnu 会按非 dry-run 迁移。拼错 --dry-run/--continue/--abort/--yes 这类状态旗标时会执行错误动作且 exit 0/正常输出。
fix_direction: 为所有命令接入统一 unknown-flag validation，写命令至少将未知 flag 作为 hard error；保留 read-only 命令 warning 模式也应显式配置。补回归：sync --continuu 不得 start sync，store migrate --dry-rnu 不得写入，install --dry-rnu 不得安装。

context.notes: Discovered by Round 4 tail sweep DBP-20260609-032300

issue_history.note: Registered by Round 4 dedup + issue creation worker

title: Packaged Fabric skills still instruct agents to inspect retired project-local .fabric/knowledge trees
description: Store runtime layout now puts knowledge under mounted stores with STORE_LAYOUT.knowledgeDir='knowledge', and project policy says knowledge lives only in mounted stores. The installed fabric-review and fabric-import skill templates still describe the backlog as .fabric/knowledge/pending, tell agents to Glob .fabric/knowledge/pending/**/*.md or .fabric/knowledge/team/**/*.md, require agents.meta.json, and surface git status .fabric/knowledge. A client following the packaged skills can miss store-backed entries or act on stale local leftovers; this is distinct from registered hook/doctor/schema drift because it is the AI skill instruction surface.
fix_direction: Rewrite installed skill templates to use mounted-store/read-set/write-target language and MCP/CLI list/search surfaces instead of direct project-local globs. Remove the agents.meta precondition and .fabric/knowledge git-status instructions, or mark any legacy references explicitly as migration/quarantine-only. Add drift tests over packaged skills forbidding project-local .fabric/knowledge as an active workflow path.

context.notes: Discovered by Round 4 tail sweep DBP-20260609-032300

issue_history.note: Registered by Round 4 dedup + issue creation worker

title: Current changelog top-level highlights still publish the pre-archive-scan 5-tool MCP surface
description: The current CHANGELOG highlight says Fabric exposes 5 MCP tools and lists fab_plan_context, fab_get_knowledge_sections, fab_recall, fab_extract_knowledge, and fab_review, omitting fab_archive_scan. The active root README, runtime-contract doc, and server registration all expose six tools including fab_archive_scan. This is distinct from the registered package server README omission because it affects the top-level release-note/runtime surface consumed before package docs.
fix_direction: Update the current changelog highlight to six MCP tools and include fab_archive_scan, then add a small doc-surface drift check that compares CHANGELOG current highlights, README tool list, docs/RUNTIME-CONTRACTS.md, and packages/server/src/index.ts registration for the MCP tool set.
